allow: PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://localhost:5080/api/auth/login -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"email":"admin@losev.org.tr","password":"Admin123!"}'; break } catch { $r = $null } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \($r\) { $r | ConvertTo-Json } else { 'API cevap vermedi' })
